title: The title follows the behavior. It always does.
summary: Almost 2 years ago, I was borrowed from the dev team to help with a design sprint. I never went back — not because it was planned, but because I started solving problems nobody assigned me.

title: AI doesn't replace the designer's judgment. It front-loads the thinking.
summary: We integrated AI throughout the full design pipeline, not just dev. By the time we open Figma, we already know what we're solving and why. Here's the 8-step process we built.

title: Just launched my first Fiverr gig.
summary: 2 years of designing end-to-end products at a healthcare SaaS company, now taking that same standard to freelance. Production-ready designs developers can actually build from, not just pretty mockups.
